title: Cooler Bag cool bag Picnic Backpack Insulated Large Waterproof Cooler Backpack 25L Leakproof picnic bag for Camping, Picnic, BBQ, Travelling and Outdoor Activities (Classic - Blue)
features: Leakproof & Insulated: Our backpack uses high-density thick wear-resistant insulation material inside, and 600D high-grade fabric outside. The inter-layer uses thick 5mm pearl cotton to extend the heat preservation/cold time，keep the contents inside fresh for up to 24 hours. The inside is made of PEVA insulation material, and the unique sealing design can prevent water leakage.

Multi-pocket - Insulated and waterproof cooling backpack has 6 pockets. 1 large storage compartment, 2 side mesh pockets, 1 large front zipper bag, 1 front velcro bag to keep utensils, 1 mesh pocket on the shoulder straps and 1 beer opener. Multiple pockets to meet the needs of storage of different items

Comfortable and portable - This backpack for men and women has a large capacity and a light weight. Adjustable shoulder straps and ergonomic design, padded mesh shoulder straps and back provide comfort and provide good ventilation when carrying many items
Dimensions & Capacity - you can easily bring 20 cans of 330 ml beer, 4 bottles of 500 ml cola, drinks, snacks, towels and picnic mat, etc. Size:29x19x45cm (11.5x7.5x18in)

Wide Range of Uses - thermos cool bag is perfect for picnics, camping, beach, fishing, hiking, lunch, work or travel and other ourdoor activities; can hold meals, beer, snacks, fruit, high-strength drinks, towels, and other necessities; Easy to clean, empty everything, drain and dry thoroughly with a towel
description: YDFYX 30 Cans Insulated Cooler Backpack for Hiking Whether you have strong interest in road/ beach trip, picnics or daily hiking, the YDFYX backpack cooler is your best partner for all types of outdoor activities. The stylish design of our insulated backpack make it also can be used as a lunch backpack or daily pack. 【Product Features】 Keep your food cool and safety Keeping warm or cold and leak-resistant: Insulated with thicken leakproof PEVA liner on all sides, the cooler backpack retains cold or hot for hours. High quality waterproof zippers add its anti-leaking from outside. High-density insulation material and leak-proof PEVA liner to make sure anti-leaking and keep your snacks or drinks cool for 16 hours temperature below 15℃ (with Freeze Packs) Ventilate Exterior Material Our insulated backpacks use ventilate material on the back to avoid your clothes getting wet by the condensation. Durable and easy to clean This camping coolers is comfy and versatile which is made of high-density tear resistant fabric with padded, adjustable straps. Leak resistant The inner insulation thicken foam and leak-proof liner work together to make sure anti-leaking. 【Multi Compartments】 The main storage compartment is large enough to provide roomy capacity for your beers, juice, sandwiches or other food. Two front zipper pocket can be used for your chip bags, travel wallet or other small accessories which can be easily access. Two bottle holders on the side that worked nice for your water or umbrella. There is also one mesh pocket on the strap for your 12 ProMAX. The strap on the front is perfect for your picnic pad. 1 beer opener on the strap for your easily use. With this picnic backpack cooler, you can spend the idyllic day with your family, enjoying the drinking at the beach or on the boat
